name: Benne-Oyster Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Oyster liquor, drained from the oysters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a baking sheet or heavy-bottomed pan, cook the benne seeds over medium heat until evenly browned for about 10-15 minutes.
2. Remove and grind the benne seeds into a paste using a mortar and pestle. Add a few drops of oyster liquor or cream if needed to achieve the desired consistency.
3. Heat the cream and oyster liquor together in a saucepan.
4. Gradually stir in the benne paste, then add the oysters. Continue heating until the oysters are just curled, which should take only about 1 minute.
5. Season with cayenne pepper and black pepper to taste. Serves 2.
